auswahl_aktion.label: Aktion auswählen
auswahl_aktion.description:
One selected option of multiple available options (or `null`/`None`).

The available options are defined in the `lookup_data` attribute of this control.

The field value will be the key in this `lookup_data` attribute (or `null`/`None`).

Displayed as single-select field in HTML pages.

titel.label: Titel der Aufnahme
titel.description: A string value not longer than 4000 characters (or `null`/`None`).

aufnahmedatum.label: Aufnahmedatum
aufnahmedatum.description:
A calendar date consisting of year, month and day (or `null`/`None`)

The field value will be a string in the format `<YYYY>-<MM>-<DD>` (or `null`/`None`).

For example: `2000-02-29`.

audiodatei.label: Audio-Datei
audiodatei.description:
An uploaded file (or `null`/`None`).

The field value will be the URL to download the file in the form `https://my.living-apps.de/files/690c50c670415a9e4d1a70cd/data/<record-id>/<control-identifier>/<internal-id>` (or `null`/`None`).

dokumenttyp.label: Dokumenttyp
dokumenttyp.description:
One selected option of multiple available options (or `null`/`None`).

The available options are defined in the `lookup_data` attribute of this control.

The field value will be the key in this `lookup_data` attribute (or `null`/`None`).

Displayed as single-select field in HTML pages.

notizen.label: Notizen
notizen.description: A string value that can contain multiple lines of text (or `null`/`None`).

dokument_titel.label: Dokumenttitel
dokument_titel.description: A string value not longer than 4000 characters (or `null`/`None`).

quelle_audio.label: Quelle Audio-Aufnahme
quelle_audio.description:
A reference to a LivingApp record from the target lookup app 'Audio-Aufnahmen' with the id `690c50c670415a9e4d1a70cd` (or `null`/`None`).

The field value will be a valid record URL in the form `https://my.living-apps.de/rest/apps/690c50c670415a9e4d1a70cd/<record-id>` (or `null`/`None`).

Displayed as single-select field in HTML pages.

umwandlungsdatum.label: Umwandlungsdatum
umwandlungsdatum.description:
A calendar date consisting of year, month and day (or `null`/`None`)

The field value will be a string in the format `<YYYY>-<MM>-<DD>` (or `null`/`None`).

For example: `2000-02-29`.

text_inhalt.label: Text-Inhalt
text_inhalt.description: A string value that can contain multiple lines of text (or `null`/`None`).

bearbeitungsnotizen.label: Bearbeitungsnotizen
bearbeitungsnotizen.description: A string value that can contain multiple lines of text (or `null`/`None`).

standarddokument.label: Umgewandeltes Dokument
standarddokument.description:
An uploaded file (or `null`/`None`).

The field value will be the URL to download the file in the form `https://my.living-apps.de/files/690c50caef7c15cf32d0901c/data/<record-id>/<control-identifier>/<internal-id>` (or `null`/`None`).
